## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Humanization quality improvement
- [ ] AI detector or watermark improvement
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor or maintenance

## Validation

- [ ] Added or updated tests where needed
- [ ] Ran relevant Python tests
- [ ] Ran relevant PHP tests
- [ ] Ran relevant TypeScript tests
- [ ] Updated documentation or examples
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` for user-facing changes

## Quality and Safety

- [ ] Preserves meaning and protected spans such as URLs, code, emails, names, dates, and numbers
- [ ] Does not introduce network calls in the default local path
- [ ] Handles large or adversarial input without obvious CPU or memory blowups
- [ ] Does not weaken security, privacy, or responsible-use guidance

## Notes for Reviewers

Mention any risky areas, known limitations, benchmark results, or follow-up work.
